reviews.review_description: Not elliot game

I love it 🗿 still

Ty
I’m not the owner

Bro this game is the best game ever even though it doesn't have the best graphics. I still like it but I'm wondering if you can please give me mods. I will be the best person to invite people and make them play the game. I have been supporting the game for a while. I think I deserve moderator as well. I've been reporting people that have been toxic or mean to other players and I do insure you to fix the servers and maybe add a couple more things to the game and probably fix graphics a little bit more and let us jump a little bit higher. but all that said it's the best game ever and I would love to be modder whatever you can to do to make me it would be good because I would really love that and I really want to see what the mod vents look like and obviously nobody can glitch out the map cuz you can't even jump and you can't even Wall climb but all I want to say is please make me modern 😭😭

This game is looks Maxing Ohio while edging skibidi rizzlers all at the same time while popping a grimace shake in fortnite when I saw this game I was like ermm what the Sigma Let me looks Max on this gyatt like holy rizz.
It’s laggy1* you can’t go into horror2* the tree copy of capuchin leads to nothing3*

developer_response.body:
sorry that you are having lag problems, if you're on quest 2 i recommend you chance the settings for post processing off, and also Horror has been shut down and is being rebuilt  from the ground up! so please be patient. and the second floor to the map currently has nothing because we havent thought of anything to put there yet. but you can put ideas in the discord server if you would like to join :)

Discord: https://discord.gg/ZAy9svtUdk

developer_response.body:
Sorry this is not Elliots game, Elliots game is "Monkiverse"
Note: I did not "copy" elliots game my game came out a couple months before elliots game. just to let you know :)

GAME IS ABSOLUTELY GOOD NO ONE CARES ABOUT ONE STAR REVIEWS EVERYONE CARES ABOUT FIVE STAR REVIEWS LIKE THIS ONE THIS GAME IS ABSOLUTELY GOOD BUT THERE'S A TEENY TINY LAG BUT I DON'T CARE THE GAME IS JUST AMAZING IT SHOULD STAY UP FOREVER AND IT SHOULD GET MORE POPULAR CUZ THE OWNER OF THE GAME WORKS HARD ON IT SOMETIMES BUT IF HE EVER GIVES ME MOD IT'S OKAY HE DOESN'T NEED TO IF HE WANTS BUT THE GAME IS ABSOLUTELY AMAZING QUALITY IS KIND OF GOOD BLUD WOULD NOT LET YOU ESCAPE THE MAP HE KEEPS THE MAP PROTECTIVE AS CRAP BUT THERE IS A WAY TO GET OUT THE MAP BUT I THINK HE SAID HE DOESN'T CARE BUT ANYWAYS FIVE STAR  ★★★★★

developer_response.body: Thanks! We are going to probably be updating the game more frequently because the game is now on the Meta Quest Store, so we are going to be updating it more! thanks for asking/suggesting! :)

reviews.review_title: Best gorilla tag fan game ever
reviews.review_description: This is a really good game with crazy game mode. Can’t believe that there was a prop hunt just amazing like no one should not get this app. ￼

developer_response.body: sorry there is no prop hunt in this game, if your looking for a  Elliots game search up "Monkiverse" on the Meta Horizon Store. :)

developer_response.body:
Sorry that you are having this problem, to reduce lag you are able to do it by pressing the computer tab named "Settings" and it should reduce lag, or press "colors" just do not press the "Name" Tab or it will lag alot 

thank you :)
